business.name: EL-NOVIK
business.tagline: Built for Sound. Made for Creativity. Rooted in Nigeria.
business.description: EL-NOVIK is a Nigerian musical instruments and electronics shop. We sell traditional African instruments, modern instruments, and audio electronics.

categories.name: Traditional Instruments
categories.description: African traditional instruments including drums, talking drums, shekere, and more.

categories.name: Modern Instruments
categories.description: Guitars, keyboards, bass guitars, and other contemporary instruments.

categories.name: Electronics
categories.description: Audio electronics including mixers, amplifiers, microphones, speakers, and studio equipment.

faq.question: Where are you located?
faq.answer: We are based in Nigeria. Contact us on WhatsApp for our exact address and directions.

faq.question: Do you deliver?
faq.answer: Yes, we can arrange delivery. Chat with us on WhatsApp to discuss delivery options and costs to your location.

faq.question: Can I negotiate the price?
faq.answer: We offer fair and competitive prices. Reach out on WhatsApp to discuss pricing on specific items.

faq.question: Do you repair instruments?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer repair and maintenance services. Send us a WhatsApp message describing what needs fixing and we will advise you.

faq.question: How do I make a purchase?
faq.answer: Simply find the product you want on our website and click the WhatsApp button, or chat with our team directly.

personality.language: clear simple English, occasionally warm and conversational
personality.avoid: being too formal, using jargon, making up prices or product details not in this document
